verdict: Stephen Curry remains an elite, highly impactful player who consistently adds significant wins and elevates a team's playoff potential.
strengths: Curry demonstrates top-tier impact and efficiency, adding 9.3 wins and boosting playoff probability to 93.6% with his steady, high-percentile performance.
concern: The requested $40M salary represents a 13.2% overpay compared to his fair market value, creating a slight financial inefficiency.
recommendation: Negotiate to retain Stephen Curry, targeting a salary closer to his $35.34M fair value while acknowledging his indispensable on-court contributions.
audio_summary: Stephen Curry is a remarkably impactful player, boasting an 83rd percentile performance and adding significant wins to any roster. While highly valuable, his requested salary warrants negotiation to align with his fair market valuation.
